name: Crispy Chicken Tenders
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic bag, mix together the flour, poultry seasoning, paprika, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
2. In a bowl, lightly beat the egg and milk.
3. Dip each chicken piece in the egg mixture, then coat it with the seasoned flour mixture. Shake off any excess coating.
4. Heat about 1/4 inch of oil in a large skillet over high heat.
5. Brown the chicken pieces on all sides for a few minutes until they are golden brown.
6. Reduce the heat to medium and continue cooking the chicken for an additional 10 minutes, or until it is cooked through and crispy.
